evals.name: implied-vol-numerical-regression
evals.prompt: Review finstack/core/src/math/volatility/implied.rs for numerical stability and regression test gaps around short expiry and low vega.
evals.expected_output: Findings-first quant review with numerical regression notes, edge-case tests, tolerance recommendations, and targeted verification.

evals.name: credit-attribution-market-conventions
evals.prompt: Review the credit attribution changes for market convention issues, especially CS01 units, hazard curves, spread bumps, and binding exposure.
evals.expected_output: Findings-first quant review that opens market standards and module index references, checks units/conventions, and traces binding/parity exposure when relevant.
